title: gentiana verna subsp. angulosa
intro: Gentiana verna subsp. angulosa, also known as the Early Gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family, characterized by its distinctive angular leaves and vibrant blue flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Gentiana verna subsp. angulosa include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
